name: TTGK CM01 USB Audio
quirks: Observed Linux endpoints expose CM01 Analog Stereo output plus a CM01 Mono capture endpoint for an attached microphone.
Local PipeWire logs showed ALSA playback resyncs when WaveLinux5 ran this adapter at 8 ms with heavy realtime FX, so the profile keeps a more conservative USB-mic latency floor.
source_notes: Seeded from local PipeWire detection: TTGK Technology Co.,Ltd CM01 reports USB ids 3302:33a0 and ALSA card name CM01.
